← All NHC examples

NHC1 — non-finisher carries TCF unchanged into next race

Scoring system: NHC1    α (blend factor): 0.15 
Same setup as 01 plus a 5th boat (Echo, TCF 0.98) that DNFs.

Echo is excluded from CT_avg, mean(TCF), and finisherCount.
Echo's newTcf must equal its tcfApplied (0.98) — unchanged.
Echo gets penalty points = fleet entries + 1 = 6.

Aggregates and other boats unchanged from 01.
No nhc sub-object; newTcf == tcfApplied

Race 1

Gun time: 14:00:00   α: 0.15   Finishers: 4   CTavg: 67m 15s   mean(TCF): 1.0250
RankNameSail # Finish timeETTCFappliedCT CTavg/CTfair TCFadjnew TCF Points
1 Alpha 1 14:50:00 50m 00s 0.9500 47m 30s 1.4158 1.3450 +0.0592 1.0092 1
2 Beta 2 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 1.1208 1.1208 +0.0181 1.0181 2
3 Gamma 3 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0500 73m 30s 0.9150 0.9607 -0.0134 1.0366 3
4 Delta 4 15:20:00 80m 00s 1.1000 88m 00s 0.7642 0.8406 -0.0389 1.0611 4
— Echo 5 DNF — 0.9800 — — — — 0.9800 6

Series standings

RankNameSail #R1TotalNet
1 Alpha 1 1 1 1
2 Beta 2 2 2 2
3 Gamma 3 3 3 3
4 Delta 4 4 4 4
5 Echo 5 DNF 6 6
